positive: Minimalist abstract illustration of a glowing crescent moon cradling a stylized, roaring lion silhouette. The scene should feature a deep indigo and sapphire color palette contrasted with brilliant gold and ethereal white accents. Use clean linework, high contrast, and a strong geometric composition suitable for apparel printing. The style should evoke elegant celestial modernism, with the stars rendered as perfect, glowing orbs. Center composition, flat vector graphic feel, ideal for screen printing.
